steps.name: Nmap Scanning & Enumeration
steps.content:
### 📡 Network Port Scan
Execute `nmap -sC -sV 10.10.11.45` to discover active open ports (FTP 21, SSH 22, HTTP 80, SMB 445).

### 📜 Target IP
`10.10.11.45`

steps.name: Web Service Exploitation & Reverse Shell
steps.content:
### 💥 Web Vulnerability Exploitation
Intercept upload traffic on HTTP port 80 and bypass extension validation to gain initial access via webshell.

steps.name: Privilege Escalation & Root Flag
steps.content:
### 👑 Linux Root Privilege Escalation
Exploit SUID binary vulnerabilities (`find / -perm -4000 2>/dev/null`) to escalate permissions to root and retrieve the system flag.

Flag: `FLAG{TRYHACKME_NETWORK_PENTEST_MASTER_2026}`
